scriptLines:
source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    output(
        PARTY_SITE_NUMBER as string,
        ADDRESS1 as string,
        ADDRESS2 as string,
        ADDRESS3 as string,
        CITY as string,
        POSTAL_CODE as string,
        STATE as string,
        COUNTRY as string,
        COUNTY as string,
        PROVINCE as string,
        ACCT_SITE_STATUS as string,
        SITE_START_DATE as string,
        END_DATE as string,
        ACCOUNT_NUMBER as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcStaged

srcStaged derive(
    msdyn_name = toString(PARTY_SITE_NUMBER),
    msdyn_address1 = toString(ADDRESS1),
    msdyn_address2 = toString(ADDRESS2),
    msdyn_address3 = toString(ADDRESS3),
    msdyn_city = toString(CITY),
    msdyn_postalcode = toString(POSTAL_CODE),
    msdyn_stateorprovince = toString(STATE),
    msdyn_country = toString(COUNTRY),
    opx_county = toString(COUNTY),
    opx_province = toString(PROVINCE),
    statecode = case(equals(ACCT_SITE_STATUS, 'A'), 0, equals(ACCT_SITE_STATUS, 'I'), 1, 0),
    msdyn_LocationOpenDate = toTimestamp(SITE_START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    opx_endDate = toTimestamp(END_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    opx_accountNumber = toString(ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
) ~> dc_1

dc_2 split(
    __row_valid == true(),
    disjoint: false
) ~> cs_1@(valid)

cs_1@valid sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkFinal

cs_1 sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkTransformErrors
